name: EVM.NOW Support
description: A patronage contract for the EVM.NOW contract explorer. Supporters subscribe at one of four tiers (Supporter, Gold, Platinum, Partner) by paying ETH converted from USD pricing via Chainlink. Each subscription is represented as a soulbound-style ERC-721 NFT (one per wallet) with fully onchain SVG metadata showing tier, status, and history. Subscriptions can be extended, upgraded, downgraded, or gifted. A 20% discount applies to commitments of 12 months or longer. The Partner tier is reserved for grants by the contract owner.
about:
## Supporting the world computer's explorer

EVM.NOW is a contract explorer that helps anyone read, interact with, and understand verified smart contracts on Ethereum. Running infrastructure like archive nodes, RPC endpoints, and indexers costs real money. This contract lets users directly fund the project through recurring ETH subscriptions — no intermediaries, no credit cards, just onchain patronage.

## Tiered subscriptions

Four tiers are available: Supporter ($10/month), Gold ($69/month), Platinum ($250/month), and Partner. Prices are denominated in USD and converted to ETH at the current exchange rate via Chainlink's ETH/USD price feed. Committing to 12 or more months earns a 20% discount. The Partner tier cannot be purchased directly — it is granted by the contract owner to select collaborators.

Subscriptions can be extended at the same tier, upgraded to a higher tier, or downgraded. When changing tiers, remaining time is converted pro-rata at the respective tier prices. Upgrades require at least 30 days of new coverage. Anyone can gift or extend a subscription for someone else, though only the recipient (or owner) can change tiers.

## Onchain NFT membership cards

Each subscription is represented as an ERC-721 token — one per wallet. The NFT's metadata and artwork are generated entirely onchain as SVG by a dedicated renderer contract. The card displays the supporter's address (with ENS resolution), their current tier badge, subscription dates, active/expired status, and a full history of tier changes. Transferring the NFT transfers the subscription to the new holder.

## Built for anyone to use

The Support contracts are open source and designed as composable building blocks. The core subscription logic is separate from the ERC-721 token layer, the pricing hook system, and the onchain renderer — each piece can be swapped, extended, or replaced independently. Hooks let you plug in custom discount logic, tier restrictions, slot limits, or any other business rules without touching the core contract. Anyone can deploy their own Support contract with their own tiers, pricing, and hooks.
risks: Prices denominated in USD but paid in ETH — volatile exchange rates may affect cost at transaction time
One NFT per wallet — transferring the token transfers subscription ownership to the recipient
Partner tier is grant-only — cannot be purchased even with sufficient ETH
No upgradeability — contract logic cannot be patched after deployment
Excess ETH is refunded to msg.sender — ensure your wallet can receive ETH refunds

support.title: Support
support.description: Subscribe or extend a subscription at a given tier. Pays in ETH (converted from USD via Chainlink). Third parties can gift or extend subscriptions, but only the recipient or owner can change tiers. Excess ETH is refunded.
support.warning: Sends ETH. The Partner tier (3) is blocked for direct purchase. Excess ETH is refunded to your address.

tier.label: tier
tier.description: Subscription tier: 0 = Supporter ($10/mo), 1 = Gold ($69/mo), 2 = Platinum ($250/mo), 3 = Partner ($1,000/mo, grant-only)

duration.label: months
duration.description: Number of months to subscribe (12+ months for 20% discount)

estimate.title: Estimate Cost
estimate.description: Calculate the ETH cost and adjusted duration for a tier and duration. Includes any applicable discounts (20% off for 12+ months). Use this before calling support() to know the exact cost.

supporter.label: supporter
supporter.description: Address to check (affects cost if upgrading/downgrading)

grant.title: Grant Subscription
grant.description: Grant a free subscription to an address. Only callable by the contract owner. Used for Partner tier grants and honorary subscriptions.

startAt.label: start time
startAt.description: Custom start timestamp (0 to start immediately)

isActive.title: Is Active
isActive.description: Check whether an address has an active subscription.

subscription.title: Subscription ID
subscription.description: Get the subscription ID for an address. Returns 0 if the address has never subscribed.

subscriptions.title: Subscription Data
subscriptions.description: Get the full subscription data for a subscription ID: when it was created, when the current period started, and when it expires.

currentTier.title: Current Tier
currentTier.description: Get the current tier and active status for a subscription ID.

tierPeriods.title: Tier History
tierPeriods.description: Get the full tier change history for a subscription. Each entry records when the subscriber moved to a new tier.

tierPrices.title: Tier Price
tierPrices.description: Get the monthly USD price for a tier (8 decimal places). Tier 0: $10, Tier 1: $69, Tier 2: $250, Tier 3: $1,000.

totalTiers.title: Total Tiers
totalTiers.description: The number of available subscription tiers (4).

totalSupply.title: Total Subscriptions
totalSupply.description: Total number of subscriptions ever created (each represented as an NFT).

tokenURI.title: Token Metadata
tokenURI.description: Returns the fully onchain metadata and SVG artwork for a subscription NFT. The card shows the supporter's address, tier badge, dates, and status.

hook.title: Hook Contract
hook.description: The subscription hook contract that applies custom business logic (discounts, tier restrictions).

renderer.title: Renderer Contract
renderer.description: The contract that generates onchain SVG metadata for subscription NFTs.

logo.title: Logo
logo.description: The SVG logo content used in NFT artwork.

setTierPrice.title: Set Tier Price
setTierPrice.description: Update the monthly USD price for a tier. Only callable by the contract owner.

priceUSD.label: price (USD, 8 decimals)
priceUSD.description: Monthly price in USD with 8 decimal places (e.g. 1000000000 = $10)

addTier.title: Add Tier
addTier.description: Add a new subscription tier with a monthly USD price. Only callable by the contract owner.

priceUSD.label: price (USD, 8 decimals)
priceUSD.description: Monthly price in USD with 8 decimal places

setHook.title: Set Hook
setHook.description: Set or remove the subscription hook contract. Only callable by the contract owner.

setLogo.title: Set Logo
setLogo.description: Update the SVG logo used in NFT artwork. Only callable by the contract owner.

setRenderer.title: Set Renderer
setRenderer.description: Update the renderer contract for NFT metadata generation. Only callable by the contract owner.

withdraw.title: Withdraw
withdraw.description: Withdraw all collected ETH to the contract owner. Only callable by the contract owner.

owner.title: Owner
owner.description: The address that controls admin functions.

pendingOwner.title: Pending Owner
pendingOwner.description: The address nominated to become the new owner (two-step transfer). Must call acceptOwnership() to complete.

transferOwnership.title: Transfer Ownership
transferOwnership.description: Nominate a new owner. The nominee must call acceptOwnership() to complete the transfer. Only callable by the current owner.

acceptOwnership.title: Accept Ownership
acceptOwnership.description: Accept a pending ownership transfer. Only callable by the nominated address.

saleStart.title: Sale Start
saleStart.description: The timestamp when subscriptions become available for purchase.

setSaleStart.title: Set Sale Start
setSaleStart.description: Update when subscriptions become available. Only callable by the contract owner.

supportsInterface.title: Supports Interface
supportsInterface.description: Check whether this contract implements a specific interface (EIP-165). Supports ERC-721 and ERC-4906.

Supported.title: Subscription Created/Extended
Supported.description: Emitted when a subscription is created, extended, or tier-changed.

TierPriceUpdated.description: Emitted when a tier's monthly USD price is updated.

HookUpdated.description: Emitted when the subscription hook contract is changed.

Withdrawal.description: Emitted when collected ETH is withdrawn by the owner.

MetadataUpdate.description: Emitted when a subscription NFT's metadata changes (ERC-4906). Signals marketplaces to refresh the token.

LogoUpdated.description: Emitted when the SVG logo is updated.

RendererUpdated.description: Emitted when the renderer contract is updated.

InvalidTier.title: Invalid Tier
InvalidTier.description: The specified tier does not exist.

InvalidDuration.title: Invalid Duration
InvalidDuration.description: Duration must be at least 1 month for new subscriptions or reactivations.

InsufficientPayment.title: Insufficient Payment
InsufficientPayment.description: The ETH sent is less than the required amount. Use estimate() to check the cost first.

TransferFailed.title: Transfer Failed
TransferFailed.description: ETH refund or withdrawal transfer failed. Ensure the recipient can receive ETH.

NothingToWithdraw.title: Nothing to Withdraw
NothingToWithdraw.description: The contract has no ETH balance to withdraw.

TierChangeForbidden.title: Tier Change Forbidden
TierChangeForbidden.description: Only the subscription holder or contract owner can change tiers. Third parties can only extend at the current tier.
